paper_title: string — Full title of the paper
source: string — Where the paper was obtained (arXiv, OpenReview, Google Scholar)

task_definition.domain: string — Research domain (e.g., computer vision, NLP, robotics)
task_definition.task: string — Specific task addressed (e.g., video generation, object detection)
task_definition.problem_statement: string — One-paragraph description of what problem the paper solves

metrics.name: string — Metric name (e.g., FID, BLEU, mAP)
metrics.description: string — description of what this metric measures
metrics.definition: string — Mathematical definition or formula for the metric

metrics.name: string — Metric name (e.g., FID, BLEU, mAP)
metrics.description: string — description of what this metric measures
metrics.definition: string — Mathematical definition or formula for the metric

results.proposed_method: string|number — Score of this paper's method
results.best_baseline_name: string — Name of the best competing method

key_findings: string — Notable findings or takeaways from experiments
